extensionDescription.message: Ithuluzi lokuqhathanisa elilula elingaxhunyiwe ku-inthanethi lombhalo nekhodi.
extensionDescription.description: Description shown in the Chrome Web Store

headerSubtitle.message: Qhathanisa umbhalo, ikhodi, i-JSON, nokuningi — okungaxhunyiwe ku-inthanethi

placeholderOriginal.message: Namathisela umbhalo wangempela noma ikhodi lapha...

placeholderModified.message: Namathisela umbhalo oshintshiwe noma ikhodi lapha...

emptyStateBody.message: Namathisela umbhalo kuwo womabili amaphaneli bese uchofoza okuthi Qhathanisa — noma cindezela u-Ctrl+Enter

identicalBody.message: Awukho umehluko otholakele phakathi kokufakwayo okubili.

errorLargeInput.message: Okokufaka kukhulu kakhulu. I-Diff ingathatha isikhashana...

errorBothEmpty.message: Sicela unamathisele okuqukethwe kuwo womabili amaphaneli ngaphambi kokuqhathanisa.

errorOneEmpty.message: Iphaneli eyodwa ayinalutho. Sicela unikeze okuqukethwe kuwo womabili amaphaneli.

formatJSONError.message: I-JSON engavumelekile kuphaneli elilodwa noma womabili.
